prompt_template.system: You are a financial sentiment regression model. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "sentiment_score". The value must be a number between -1 and 1, where -1 is very negative/bearish, 0 is neutral, and 1 is very positive/bullish. Do not include any extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one numeric key: sentiment_score.

components.name: range_reward
components.description: Predicted score lies in the closed interval [-1, 1].

components.name: proximity_reward
components.description: Reward increases as the prediction gets numerically closer to the gold score.
